title: PB-UMKU Sections (table-20260628-2)
description: Array of sections, each containing PB-UMKU licence entries extracted from kkp2.xlsx Sheet1. Numbered lists use the kkp-licensing family-canonical recursive Item {teks, sub} idiom.

Item.description: One node in a numbered list (persyaratan, kewajiban, or parameter). Recursive. Reuses the kkp-licensing family canonical idiom: the full line (numbering prefix included) lives in `teks`; nested levels go in `sub`.

Tier.description: One authority/scope block within an Entry. Entries with no tier-divider rows have a single Tier with tier_label null.

tier_label.description: Heading text that labels this scope block (e.g. 'Untuk Angkutan Laut Dalam Negeri...', 'Gubernur') or null when the entry has only one implicit tier.

persyaratan.description: Nested requirements list from Col C for this tier.

kewajiban.description: Nested obligations list from Col E for this tier.

parameter.description: Nested parameter list from Col G for this tier.

Entry.description: One PB-UMKU licence entry inside a section.

no.description: Entry number from Col A, Arabic-numeral form (e.g. '1.').

nama_pb_umku.description: Licence name from Col B with leading '*' stripped.

applies_to_all_kbli.description: True when Col B carried the '*' prefix indicating the licence applies to all KBLI.

kbli_note.description: The note qualifier from Col B when present, as plain text (parens stripped). Null when absent.

jangka_waktu_penerbitan.description: Issuance period from Col D (first occurrence per entry).

masa_berlaku.description: Validity period from Col F (first occurrence per entry; soft-hyphen artefacts removed).

kewenangan.description: Issuing authority from Col H; first occurrence per entry taken.

tiers.description: One or more scope blocks. Single-tier entries (most) have exactly one element with tier_label null.

Section.description: A Roman-numeral section wrapper grouping related entries.

section_id.description: Roman-numeral identifier extracted from Col A (e.g. 'I', 'II').

section_title.description: Full section heading text from Col A with the Roman numeral and period stripped.

items.description: PB-UMKU entries belonging to this section.
